title: Design Team!!
excerpt: We are beyond thrilled to finally announce the 2017 Amy Tangerine Design Team! Thank you so much to all of you who applied. It was a really tough decision narrowing it down to just three, as there were so many…
body:
We are beyond thrilled to finally announce the 2017 Amy Tangerine Design Team! Thank you so much to all of you who applied. It was a really tough decision narrowing it down to just three, as there were so many talented people showing us amazing creative work. American Crafts and I kept going back and forth as I wanted to try to grow increase the team members before we even got started (I am enthusiastic and eager). So thank you thank you, I love seeing all of your work, so please continue to share using #amytangerine and leave links in the comments of this blog!

Please join me in welcoming these ladies who will be sharing projects regularly on the blog as well as on their social channels! XOXOXO!

Violeta Scrap - Blog | Instagram | Twitter | Facebook | YouTube

Carson Riutta - Pine and Plum Blog | Instagram | Twitter | Facebook

Zinia Amoiridou - Abstract Inspiration Blog | Instagram | Twitter | Facebook
